transferAxolotl(uint256,uint256).notice: Moves an axolotl to a new tank.         Uses swap-and-pop to remove from the old tank array (O(n) scan, O(1) removal).

updateAxolotl(uint256,string,string,byte.notice: Updates name, morphData, and photoHash. species and birthDate are immutable.
